channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: 'Toy Story 5' trailer introduces new characters and storyline
item.description: Disney and Pixar released a new 'Toy Story 5' trailer and poster. Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the toys face a new threat to playtime: a tablet device.

item.title: Trump says Iran 'negotiating on fumes' as Israel intensifies war in Lebanon
item.description: The U.S. and Iran trade threats but appear ready to de-escalate, while Israel expands deadly attacks on the other front of the complex war in Lebanon.

item.title: AP investigation finds 'alarming' rate of suicide deaths among ICE detainees
Key findings from AP investigation into spike in ICE detainee suicide deaths
